present.english: The happy waiter drinks the hot coffee
The new guests drink the cold beer

imperfect.english: I was drinking the cold water
The happy waiter was drinking the hot coffee
The new guests were drinking the cold beer

future.english: I will drink the cold water
The happy waiter will drink the hot coffee
The new guests will drink the cold beer

aorist.english: The happy waiter drank the hot coffee
The new guests drank the cold beer

optative.english: I should drink the cold water

optative.georgian: ბედნიერმა მიმტანმა ცხელი ყავა უნდა დალიოს
optative.english: The happy waiter should drink the hot coffee

optative.georgian: ახალმა სტუმრებმა ცივი ლუდი უნდა დალიონ
optative.english: The new guests should drink the cold beer

imperative.english: You all (you formal), drink the strong coffee
